Document:
# Ranged Weapons
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Ranged_Weapons"]
Ranged weapons dominate most fights in the Wasteland. They cover everything from scavenged pipe guns and revolvers to laser rifles, plasma weapons, and heavy support guns.
## Categories
Ranged weapons are grouped by their role and ammunition type.
[color=#a4885c]Small Guns[/color]: pistols, revolvers, rifles, shotguns, and SMGs using conventional ammo.
[color=#a4885c]Big Guns[/color]: heavy support weapons such as miniguns, flamers, and launchers.
[color=#a4885c]Energy Weapons[/color]: laser weapons powered by energy cells and related power cells.
[color=#a4885c]Plasma Weapons[/color]: high-damage plasma arms using advanced energy ammunition.
## Common Ammunition
Carry more ammunition than you think you need, and always know which weapon uses which feed type.
[bold]9mm Magazine[/bold] — Feeds 9mm pistols and some SMGs.
[bold]10mm Magazine[/bold] — Standard magazine for 10mm pistols and SMGs.
[bold].45 Magazine[/bold] — Used by .45 caliber pistols and carbines.
[bold]5.56 Magazine[/bold] — Feeds most military rifles and carbines.
[bold]7.62 Magazine[/bold] — Used by Chinese rifles and heavier automatics.
[bold].308 Magazine[/bold] — Sniper and precision rifle ammunition.
[bold]Energy Cell[/bold] — Microfusion cells powering laser weapons.
[bold]Plasma Cell[/bold] — Specialized cartridges for plasma weapons.
## Field Maintenance
Weapons degrade with use, poor storage, and abuse. A badly maintained gun is less accurate, more likely to malfunction, and much more dangerous to rely on in a long fight.
